name: multi-field-correction-one-turn
description: User packs multiple corrections into a single message: 'change name to X and remove drain cleaning from services'. Bot has to handle this gracefully — at minimum, ONE of the corrections lands. Strict assertion is on the name change since that's the higher-confidence one for the LLM. The remove may or may not also fire (LLM may pick whichever feels more salient); both behaviors are acceptable as long as the name change succeeds and the bot doesn't crash.

turns.user: change the name to Noman Pro Plumbing and remove drain cleaning from services
